items.title: Agemem Main Results

meta.experiment_or_case: Main results across 5 long-horizon benchmarks (ALFWorld, SciWorld, PDDL, BabyAI, HotpotQA) on Qwen2.5-7B and Qwen3-4B
meta.metric: average task score (%), memory-quality MQ, active-context tokens
meta.limitations: No per-benchmark variance reported in fetched text; absolute compute cost not given.
